name: Alice's Adventures - Hidden Object Puzzle Game
short_description: A cozy hidden objects adventure in Wonderland. Colorful 360-degree scenery, animation, and 3D visual effects will make your adventure vivid and fun! Scroll, zoom, use hints; no stress, just exploration.
detailed_description:
Have you always dreamed of joining Alice as she journeys in Wonderland and Through the Looking Glass? In this Hidden Objects game, your dream comes true!

 🔍 Key features:

- 360° scenes & zoom: rotate panoramas, zoom into details, spot cleverly hidden items.

- Multiple modes: list, silhouettes, pairs — play at your preferred pace.

- Hints & comfort: gentle difficulty, no intrusive timers or penalties.

- Story & collections: gather artifacts and unlock new chapters of Wonderland.

- Wonderland atmosphere: vivid locations, vintage items, charming music.

- Short sessions: perfect for bite‑sized relaxing play.

Help the heroine solve puzzles and find cleverly disguised clues so she can advance through this wondrous land. Dive into the world of fantasy!

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Arabic, Czech, Dutch, Japanese, Korean, Polish, Portuguese - Portugal, Portuguese - Brazil, Russian, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Turkish, Ukrainian
